mappings.mappingRule: Pattern retained for audit only; each foundation lesson needs semantic review.
mappings.risk: Legacy completion must remain preserved until a confirmed canonical equivalent exists.

mappings.mappingRule: HSK 1 V75 overwrites legacy level data, so IDs and semantic equivalence must be extracted before mapping.
mappings.risk: Automatic mapping could falsely mark newly structured lessons complete.

mappings.mappingRule: Map only after Phase 3 compares objectives, vocabulary and assessment coverage.
mappings.risk: Topic-name similarity is not sufficient evidence.

mappings.mappingRule: Map only after Phase 4 semantic review.
mappings.risk: Legacy lesson scope is much thinner than the canonical curriculum.

mappings.mappingRule: Map only after Phase 5 semantic review.
mappings.risk: Completion must not be inferred from matching order numbers.
